errors.evidence: Agent relied on web_search results from third-party sources (GitHub, arXiv) instead of using visit_page tool to access YouTube video's official transcript and description.
errors.description: Failed to execute planned step to verify video metadata directly, instead using external references which may not be primary sources.
errors.impact: Risk of incorrect answer due to reliance on non-official sources.

errors.evidence: Accepted corroborating evidence from non-official sources (GitHub repo, arXiv preprints) without verifying against primary video data.
errors.description: Assumed third-party references were reliable without accessing the video's official transcript or description.
errors.impact: Potential answer based on unverified secondary sources.

scores.reliability_reasoning: Relied on non-official sources and did not verify primary data, leading to uncertainty in answer accuracy.
scores.security_reasoning: Used external sources but no evidence of security issues in tool usage.
scores.instruction_adherence_reasoning: Did not follow planned steps to check video metadata directly.
scores.plan_opt_reasoning: Plan included verification steps but execution deviated to secondary sources.
